archetype: 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast - Dark Mode adapted for ArivuPro)

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: MODE B: THE 'CONTROL ROOM' GRID for Dashboard. grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6.

Triple_Document_Upload.style: Three distinct dropzones in a row. Dashed borders (border-gray-700 hover:border-teal-400), dark surface. Teal icons.

Circular_Score_Indicator.style: Massive central dashboard widget. Large circular SVG stroke. Stroke color: Teal 400 with drop-shadow glow.

Correction_Log.style: Dense tabular layout. Use JetBrains Mono for exact mistakes. Badges for Red (Error) and Amber (Missing WN).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install fonts: Cabinet Grotesk, Manrope, JetBrains Mono.
Set the Tailwind config to dark mode by default using the provided dark-mode Hex color palette.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid for the dashboard (4 columns, packed tightly, high data density).
Build the Triple Document Upload section featuring three interconnected dropzones (Question, Key, Answer Script) that validate files.
Implement ArivuPro Teal (#0D9488) primarily as an interactive accent (buttons, progress rings, links), not as a massive flat background color.
For the Correction Log, use color-coded badges for grading semantic feedback: Red for explicit errors, Green for correct, Amber for missing 'Working Notes (WN1, WN2)'.
Add test IDs (`data-testid`) to all interactive elements for robust automated testing.
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for dashboard density and premium look.
